title: roldana barba-johannis
intro: Roldana barba-johannis, also known as Johannis' Roldana or Mexican Gold, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the aster family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, offering several health benefits. In herbal preparations, Roldana barba-johannis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its effectiveness and potential side effects.
